title: Authors and Citation
text: Wright D (2026). gwaspr: GWAS plotting R. R package version 0.9.0, https://derekmichaelwright.github.io/gwaspr/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {gwaspr: GWAS plotting in R},   author = {Derek Wright},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.9.0},   url = {https://derekmichaelwright.github.io/gwaspr/}, }

title: GWAS plotting in R
text: gwaspr: R package plotting GWAS results GAPIT package GAPIT Website: https://www.maizegenetics.net/gapit GAPIT github: https://github.com/jiabowang/GAPIT

title: GWAS plotting in R
code: devtools::install_github("derekmichaelwright/gwaspr") library(gwaspr)

title: GWAS plotting in R
text: best practice, output GAPIT folder. case, located folder called GWAS_Results/. example plot GWAS results 3 traits lentil diversity panel: ****Cotyledon_Color**: qualitative trait describing cotyledon color (Red = 0, Yellow = 1). DTF_Nepal_2017: quantitative trait describing days sowing flowering 2017 Nepal field trial. DTF_Sask_2017: quantitative trait describing days sowing flowering 2017 Saskatchewan field trial. DTF_Sask_2017_b: run b coefficient photothermal model (see Wright et al. 2020) used covariate. Note: info check GWAS tutorial.

title: GWAS plotting in R
code: myG <- read.csv("myG_hmp.csv") myY <- read.csv("myY.csv")

title: GWAS plotting in R
text: List traits GWAS results files designated folder.
code: list_Traits(folder = "GWAS_Results/") ## [1] "Cotyledon_Color_RvsY" "DTF_Nepal_2017"       "DTF_Sask_2017"        ## [4] "DTF_Sask_2017_b"

title: GWAS plotting in R
text: Check see myY traits GWAS results files int designated folder.
code: is_Ran(myY = myY, folder = "GWAS_Results/") ##                 Traits GWAS ## 1 Cotyledon_Color_RvsY    X ## 2        DTF_Sask_2017    X ## 3       DTF_Nepal_2017    X

title: GWAS plotting in R
text: Checks GWAS models run trait within designated folder.
code: run_Summary(folder = "GWAS_Results/") ##                  Trait GLM MLM MLMM FarmCPU BLINK CMLM SUPER ## 1 Cotyledon_Color_RvsY   X   X    X       X     X            ## 2       DTF_Nepal_2017   X   X    X       X     X            ## 3        DTF_Sask_2017   X   X    X       X     X            ## 4      DTF_Sask_2017_b   X   X    X       X     X

title: GWAS plotting in R
text: Reorders result files already arranged P.value.
code: order_GWAS_Results(folder = "GWAS_Results/")

title: GWAS plotting in R
code: is_Ordered(folder = "GWAS_Results/") ##                  Trait GLM MLM MLMM FarmCPU BLINK CMLM SUPER FarmCPU_Kansas ## 1 Cotyledon_Color_RvsY   X   X    X       X     X                         X ## 2       DTF_Nepal_2017   X   X    X       X     X                         X ## 3        DTF_Sask_2017   X   X    X       X     X                         X ## 4      DTF_Sask_2017_b   X   X    X       X     X                         X ##   BLINK_Kansas ## 1            X ## 2            X ## 3              ## 4            X

title: GWAS plotting in R
code: myResults <- table_GWAS_Results(folder = "GWAS_Results/",                                 threshold = 6.8, sug.threshold = 5) myResults[1:5,] ##                       SNP Chr       Pos       P.value        MAF     effect ## 1 Lcu.1GRN.Chr1p365986872   1 365986872 1.754402e-175 0.47096774 -0.4683785 ## 2 Lcu.1GRN.Chr1p365986872   1 365986872 1.164052e-154 0.47096774         NA ## 3 Lcu.1GRN.Chr1p365986872   1 365986872 3.281941e-128 0.47096774 -0.4954384 ## 4 Lcu.1GRN.Chr1p361840399   1 361840399  2.178943e-84 0.04193548 -0.4603589 ## 5 Lcu.1GRN.Chr1p361840399   1 361840399  6.963600e-47 0.04193548 -0.4715544 ##     H.B.P.Value   Model   Type                Trait negLog10_P negLog10_HBP ## 1 5.901229e-170   BLINK Kansas Cotyledon_Color_RvsY  174.75587    169.22906 ## 2 3.915488e-149    MLMM    NYC Cotyledon_Color_RvsY  153.93403    148.40721 ## 3 1.103937e-122 FarmCPU Kansas Cotyledon_Color_RvsY  127.48387    121.95706 ## 4  3.664623e-79   BLINK Kansas Cotyledon_Color_RvsY   83.66175     78.43597 ## 5  1.171163e-41 FarmCPU Kansas Cotyledon_Color_RvsY   46.15717     40.93138 ##     Threshold     Effect ## 1 Significant         NA ## 2 Significant -0.4905608 ## 3 Significant         NA ## 4 Significant         NA ## 5 Significant         NA

title: GWAS plotting in R
code: for(i in list_Traits(folder = "GWAS_Results/")) {   # Plot   mp <- gg_Manhattan(     # Specify a folder with GWAS results     folder = "GWAS_Results/",      # Select a trait to plot     trait = i)   # Save   ggsave(paste0("man/figures/fig_01_", i, ".png"),           mp, width = 12, height = 3.5, bg = "white") }

title: GWAS plotting in R
code: for(i in list_Traits(folder = "GWAS_Results/")) {   # Plot   mp <- gg_Manhattan(     # Specify a folder with GWAS results     folder = "GWAS_Results/",     # Select a trait to plot     trait = i,      # Facet out the different GWAS models     facet = T)   # Save   ggsave(paste0("man/figures/fig_02_", i, ".png"),           mp, width = 12, height = 8, bg = "white") }

title: GWAS plotting in R
code: mp <- gg_Manhattan(   # Specify a folder with GWAS results   folder = "GWAS_Results/",   # Select a trait to plot   trait = "DTF_Nepal_2017",   # Create a title for the plot   title = "GWAS Results for DTF_Nepal_2017",   # Highlight specific markers   vlines = c("Lcu.1GRN.Chr2p44545877",              "Lcu.1GRN.Chr5p1658484",              "Lcu.1GRN.Chr6p3269280"),   vline.colors = c("red","red","blue"),   # Plot only certain GWAS models   models = c("MLM", "MLMM", "FarmCPU", "BLINK"),   # Set horizontal thresholds bars   threshold = 6.7,   sug.threshold = 5   ) ggsave(paste0("man/figures/fig_03.png"),           mp, width = 12, height = 3.5, bg = "white")

title: GWAS plotting in R
code: # Plot mp <- gg_Manhattan_Zoom(   # Specify a folder with GWAS results   folder = "GWAS_Results/",    # Select a trait to plot   trait = "Cotyledon_Color_RvsY",    # Plot just Chromosome 1   chr = 1,   pos1 = 360000000,   pos2 = 370000000,   # Highlight specific markers   markers = c("Lcu.1GRN.Chr1p365986872",               "Lcu.1GRN.Chr1p361840399"),   # Create alt labels for the markers   labels = c("365Mbp","361Mbp"),   # Specify Color for each marker vline   vline.colors = c("red", "blue"),   # Should models be facetted   facet = T   ) # Save ggsave("man/figures/fig_04_1.png", mp, width = 8, height = 8) # Plot mp <- gg_Manhattan_Zoom(   # Specify a folder with GWAS results   folder = "GWAS_Results/",    # Select a trait to plot   trait = "Cotyledon_Color_RvsY",    # Plot just Chromosome 1   chr = 1,   pos1 = 360000000,   pos2 = 370000000,   # Plot only certain GWAS models   models = c("MLMM","FarmCPU","BLINK"),   # Highlight specific markers   markers = c("Lcu.1GRN.Chr1p365986872",               "Lcu.1GRN.Chr1p361840399"),   # Create alt labels for the markers   labels = c("365Mbp","361Mbp"),   # Specify Color for each marker vline   vline.colors = c("red", "blue"),   # Should models be facetted   facet = F,   # set a max P value   pmax = 40   ) # Save ggsave("man/figures/fig_04_2.png", mp, width = 10, height = 4)

title: GWAS plotting in R
code: # Plot mp <- gg_Manhattan_Zoom_Traits(   # Specify a folder with GWAS results   folder = "GWAS_Results/",   # Select traits to plot   traits = c("DTF_Sask_2017","DTF_Sask_2017_b","DTF_Nepal_2017"),   # Create a title for the plot   title = "Days To Flower",   # Plot just Chromosome 1   chrom = 5,    pos1 = 1000000,   pos2 = 2500000,   # Set horizontal thresholds bars   threshold = 6.7,   sug.threshold = 5,   # Highlight specific markers   markers = "Lcu.1GRN.Chr5p1658484",   # Plot only certain GWAS models   models =  c("MLM","FarmCPU","BLINK"),   model.colors = gwaspr_Colors   )  ggsave("man/figures/fig_05.png", mp, width = 8, height = 6)

title: GWAS plotting in R
text: Uses Single GWAS model plots multiple traits
code: mp <- gg_Manhattan_xModels(   # Specify a folder with GWAS results   folder = "GWAS_Results/",   # Select traits to plot   traits = c("DTF_Sask_2017", "DTF_Sask_2017_b", "DTF_Nepal_2017"),   # Specify a title   title = "Days to Flower",   vlines = c("Lcu.1GRN.Chr2p44545877",               "Lcu.1GRN.Chr5p1658484",               "Lcu.1GRN.Chr6p3269280"),   vline.colors = c("red", "red", "blue"),   # Choose a GWAS model   models =  c("MLM","FarmCPU")   ) ggsave("man/figures/fig_06.png", mp, width = 12, height = 5, bg = "white")

title: GWAS plotting in R
text: Uses multiple GWAS models facets trait.
code: # Plot mp <- gg_Manhattan_xTraits(   # Specify a folder with GWAS results   folder = "GWAS_Results/",   # Select traits to plot   traits = c("DTF_Sask_2017", "DTF_Sask_2017_b", "DTF_Nepal_2017"),   # Specify a title   title = "Days to Flower",   # Highlight specific markers   markers = c("Lcu.1GRN.Chr2p44545877",               "Lcu.1GRN.Chr5p1658484",               "Lcu.1GRN.Chr6p3269280"),   # Create alt labels for the markers   labels = c("44Mbp","16Mbp","32Mbp"),   # Specify Color for each marker vline   vline.colors = c("red","red","blue"),   # Specify GWAS models to plot   models =  c("MLM","MLMM","FarmCPU","BLINK")   ) # Save ggsave("man/figures/fig_07.png", mp, width = 12, height = 8, bg = "white")

title: GWAS plotting in R
code: # Plot mp <- gg_GWAS_Summary(   # Specify a folder with GWAS results   folder = "GWAS_Results/",   # Specify a title   title = "Summary of Significant GWAS Results",   # Specify GWAS models to plot   models = c("MLMM","FarmCPU","BLINK")   ) # Save ggsave("man/figures/fig_08.png", mp, width = 12, height = 4) gg_plotly(mp, filename = "man/figures/fig_08.html")

title: GWAS plotting in R
code: xx <- table_GWAS_Results(folder = "GWAS_Results/", threshold = 6.8, sug.threshold = 5) mp <- gg_GWAS_Hits(   xx = xx,   xG = myG,   xCV = NULL,   range = 5000000,   traits = c("DTF_Sask_2017", "DTF_Sask_2017_b", "DTF_Nepal_2017"),   models =  c("BLINK", "FarmCPU", "MLMM", "MLM")   ) ggsave("man/figures/fig_09.png", mp, width = 12, height = 3.5)

title: GWAS plotting in R
text: single marker, single trait  multiple markers, multiple traits
code: mp <- gg_Marker_Box(xG = myG, xY = myY,                     traits = "DTF_Sask_2017",                     markers = "Lcu.1GRN.Chr6p3269280",                     plot.points = F                     ) ggsave("man/figures/fig_10_1.png", mp, width = 6, height = 4) mp <- gg_Marker_Box(xG = myG, xY = myY,                     traits = c("DTF_Nepal_2017", "DTF_Sask_2017"),                     markers = c("Lcu.1GRN.Chr5p1658484", "Lcu.1GRN.Chr2p44545877")                     ) ggsave("man/figures/fig_10_2.png", mp, width = 8, height = 4)

title: GWAS plotting in R
code: mp <- gg_Marker_Bar(xG = myG, xY = myY,                     traits = c("DTF_Nepal_2017", "DTF_Sask_2017"),                     markers = c("Lcu.1GRN.Chr2p44545877", "Lcu.1GRN.Chr5p1658484")                     ) ggsave("man/figures/fig_10_3.png", mp, width = 8, height = 4) # Plot  mp <- gg_Marker_Bar(xG = myG, xY = myY,                     traits = "Cotyledon_Color_RvsY",                     markers = "Lcu.1GRN.Chr1p365986872",                     plot.density = F                     ) # Save ggsave("man/figures/fig_10_4.png", mp, width = 6, height = 4) xx <- myY %>%    mutate(Cotyledon_Color = plyr::mapvalues(Cotyledon_Color_RvsY,                                c(0,1,NA), c("Yellow","Red","Green"))) # Plot  mp <- gg_Marker_Bar(xG = myG, xY = xx,                     traits = "Cotyledon_Color",                     markers = "Lcu.1GRN.Chr1p365986872",                     plot.density = F,                     ) # Save ggsave("man/figures/fig_10_5.png", mp, width = 6, height = 4) xx <- myY %>%    mutate(Cotyledon_Color = plyr::mapvalues(Cotyledon_Color_RvsY,                                c(0,1,NA), c("Yellow","Red","Green"))) # Plot  mp <- gg_Marker_Pie(xG = myG, xY = xx,                     trait = "Cotyledon_Color",                     markers = "Lcu.1GRN.Chr1p365986872"                     ) # Save ggsave("man/figures/fig_10_6.png", mp, width = 6, height = 4)

title: GWAS plotting in R
text: GAPIT: R package performing Genome Wide Association Studies (GWAS) https://github.com/jiabowang/GAPIT

title: GWAS plotting in R
text: tidyverse, ggpubr, ggbeeswarm, ggrepel, ggtext, plotly, htmlwidgets © Derek Michael Wright

title: calc_Threshold. — calc_Threshold
code: calc_Threshold(myG, p = 0.05)

title: calc_Threshold. — calc_Threshold
text: myG Genotype file p desired p value

title: checkNYCvsKansas — checkNYCvsKansas
text: Check NYC Kansas results identical, , Kansas file deleted.

title: checkNYCvsKansas — checkNYCvsKansas
code: checkNYCvsKansas(folder = "GWAS_Results/", deleteKansas = F)

title: checkNYCvsKansas — checkNYCvsKansas
text: folder Folder containing GWAS results. deteleKansas Logical, TRUE, delete `Kansas` files difference `NYC` files.

title: clean_GWAS_Results — clean_GWAS_Results
text: Delete extra GWAS files folder containing GWAS result files GAPIT.

title: clean_GWAS_Results — clean_GWAS_Results
code: clean_GWAS_Results(   folder = "GWAS_Results/",   remove_nonResults = F,   remove_Kansas = F,   remove_NYC = F )

title: clean_GWAS_Results — clean_GWAS_Results
text: folder Folder containing GWAS results. remove_nonResults Delelets non .csv files (.pdf files) remove_Kansas Delete Kansas files. remove_NYC Delete NYC files.

title: convert_IUPAC — convert_IUPAC
text: Converts hapmap formatted genotype files IUPAC codes.

title: convert_IUPAC — convert_IUPAC
code: convert_IUPAC(xg, toIUPAC = T)

title: convert_IUPAC — convert_IUPAC
text: toIUPAC Logical, convert IUPAC (TRUE) IUPAC (FALSE). xG GWAS genotype object. Note: needs hapmap format.

title: dropNAcol — dropNAcol
code: dropNAcol(x)

title: gg_GWAS_Hits — gg_GWAS_Hits
text: Creates summary GWAS plot significant associations.

title: gg_GWAS_Hits — gg_GWAS_Hits
code: gg_GWAS_Hits(   xx,   xG,   xCV = NULL,   traits,   range = 2e+06,   title = "",   sigMin = 0,   models = c("BLINK", "FarmCPU", "MLMM", "MLM", "GLM", "CMLM", "SUPER"),   model.colors = gwaspr_Colors,   model.shapes = c(21:25, 21:22),   vlines = NULL,   vline.colors = rep("red", length(vlines)),   vline.types = rep(1, length(vlines)),   legend.rows = 1,   facet = F,   caption = T )

title: gg_GWAS_Hits — gg_GWAS_Hits
text: xx Table significant GWAS results. See ?table_GWAS_Results(). xG Genotype data hapmap format. xCV Optional, filtering "CV" column. traits List traits use. range Range binning GWAS hits. title Title horizontal facet. sigMin Minimum number hits plot. models Models read. model.colors Colors model. vlines Markers labelled vertical red line. vline.colors colors vertical line. vline.types lty vertical line. legend.rows Number rows legend. facet Logical. facet GWAS model. caption Logical. caption added.

title: gg_GWAS_Summary — gg_GWAS_Summary
text: Creates summary GWAS plot significant associations. Note: function requires GWAS results files ordered

title: gg_GWAS_Summary — gg_GWAS_Summary
code: gg_GWAS_Summary(   folder = "GWAS_Results/",   traits = list_Traits(folder),   groups = NULL,   threshold = round(-log10(5e-08), 1),   sug.threshold = round(-log10(5e-06), 1),   chroms = NULL,   pos1 = NULL,   pos2 = NULL,   models = c("MLM", "MLMM", "FarmCPU", "BLINK", "GLM", "CMLM", "SUPER"),   model.colors = gwaspr_Colors,   shapes = 21:25,   hlines = NULL,   vlines = NULL,   vline.colors = rep("red", length(vlines)),   vline.types = rep(1, length(vlines)),   vline.legend = T,   threshold.legend = T,   title = "Summary of Significant GWAS Results",   caption = NULL,   rowread = 2000,   legend.position = "bottom",   legend.rows = 1,   plotHBPvalues = F,   skyline = "Kansas" )

title: gg_GWAS_Summary — gg_GWAS_Summary
text: folder Folder containing GWAS results. traits traits read. groups Grouping traits. equal length `traits`. threshold Significant threshold. sug.threshold Suggestive threshold. chroms Chromosomes plot. pos1 starting position plot. pos2 ending position plot. models Models read. model.colors Colors model. shapes shape values use different models. e.g., 21:25. hlines Locations horizontal lines. e.g., hlines = c(1.5,2.5). vlines Markers labelled vertical red line. vline.colors colors vertical line. vline.types lty vertical line. vline.legend Logical, display vline color legend. threshold.legend Logical, display vline color legend. title title plot. caption caption plot. rowread Number rows read GWAS results file. legend.rows Number rows legend. plotHBPvalues Logical, H.B.P.Values uses. skyline skyline type use. Can "NYC" "Kansas". left NULL, use highest P.value.

title: gg_LDHeatmap — gg_LDheatmap
code: gg_LDheatmap(   xg = myG,   chr = 6,   pos1 = 0,   pos2 = 6e+06,   myMs = NULL,   myTitle = NULL,   axisTextSize = NULL,   nameTrim = NULL )

title: gg_LDHeatmap — gg_LDheatmap
text: chr Chromosome plot. pos1 Start position within selected chromosome. pos2 End position within selected chromosome. myMs Markers highlight within plot. myTitle Title plot. axisTextSize Text size axis labels (genotype names). nameTrim String used trim marker names. xG GWAS genotype object. Note: needs hapmap format.

title: gg_Manhattan — gg_Manhattan
code: gg_Manhattan(   folder = "GWAS_Results/",   trait = list_Traits(folder)[1],   title = trait,   threshold = NULL,   sug.threshold = NULL,   chrom = NULL,   markers = NULL,   labels = markers,   vlines = markers,   vline.colors = rep("red", length(vlines)),   vline.types = rep(1:6, length(vlines)),   legend = T,   legend.rows = 1,   point.sizes = c(0.3, 1.25, 0.75),   facet = F,   addQQ = T,   pmax = NULL,   pmin = 0,   models = c("MLM", "MLMM", "FarmCPU", "BLINK", "GLM", "CMLM", "SUPER"),   model.colors = gwaspr_Colors,   highlight.sig = F,   sig.color = "darkred",   chrom.colors = rep(c("darkgreen", "darkgoldenrod3"), 30),   chrom.unit = "100 Mbp",   plotHBPvalues = F,   skyline = "Kansas" )

title: gg_Manhattan — gg_Manhattan
text: folder Folder containing GWAS results. trait trait read. title title plot. threshold Significant Threshold. sug.threshold Suggested threshold. chrom Chromosomes plot. Use want plot single chromosome. markers Markers labelled. labels Labels used markers. vlines Markers used location vertical lines. vline.colors colors vertical line. vline.types lty vertical line. legend Logical, whether add legend. legend.rows Number rows legend. point.sizes Sizes points. c("Sig", "Sig", "Sug"). facet Logical, whether produce facetted multi-model plot. Default `facet = F`. addQQ Logical, whether add QQ plot. pmax max value y-axis. Markers higher values lowered pmax.. pmin min Value plotting. Markers lower values removed. models Models read. model.colors Colors model. Used `facet = F`. highlight.sig Logical, whether highlight significant associations black circle. Used `facet = F`. sig.color Color significant assoctiations. Used `facet = T`. chrom.colors Colors chromosome. Used `facet = T`. chrom.unit Unit x-axis. Can one c("kbp","100 kbp","Mbp","100 Mbp","Gbp"). plotHBPvalues Logical, TRUE, H.B.P.values uses. skyline skyline type use. Can "NYC" "Kansas". NULL, use highest P.value.

title: gg_Manhattan_Zoom — gg_Manhattan_Zoom
text: Creates manhattan plot zoomed particular region.

title: gg_Manhattan_Zoom — gg_Manhattan_Zoom
code: gg_Manhattan_Zoom(   folder = "GWAS_Results/",   trait = list_Traits(folder)[1],   title = trait,   chrom,   pos1,   pos2,   threshold = NULL,   sug.threshold = NULL,   markers = NULL,   labels = markers,   vlines = markers,   vline.colors = rep("red", length(vlines)),   vline.types = rep(1, length(vlines)),   vline.legend = T,   pmax = NULL,   models = c("MLM", "MLMM", "FarmCPU", "BLINK", "GLM", "CMLM", "SUPER"),   model.colors = gwaspr_Colors,   facet = F,   highlight.sig = F,   sig.color = "black",   legend.rows = 1,   plotHBPvalues = F,   skyline = "Kansas" )

title: gg_Manhattan_Zoom — gg_Manhattan_Zoom
text: folder Folder containing GWAS results. trait trait read. title title plot. chrom Chromosome plot. pos1 Start position chromosome. pos2 End position chromosome. threshold Significant Threshold. sug.threshold Suggested threshold. markers Markers labelled. labels Labels used markers. vlines Markers used location vertical lines. vline.colors colors vertical line. vline.types lty vertical line. vline.legend Logical, whether add legend vlines. pmax max value y-axis. models Models read. model.colors Colors model. Used `facet = F`. facet Logical, whether produce facetted multi-model plot. Default `facet = F`. highlight.sig Logical, whether highlight significant associations black circle. Used `facet = F`. sig.color Color significant assoctiations. legend.rows Number rows legend. plotHBPvalues Logical, H.B.P.Values uses. skyline skyline type use. Can "NYC" "Kansas". left NULL, use highest P.value. addQQ Logical, whether add QQ plot chrom.colors Colors chromosome. Used `facet = T`. chrom.unit Unit x-axis. Can one c("kbp","100 kbp","Mbp","100 Mbp","Gbp").
